channel.title: Self-Hosted on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Self-Hosted on Arrans github.io

item.title: henrygd/beszel
item.description: Lightweight server monitoring with historical data, docker stats, and alerts.

item.title: Dokploy/dokploy
item.description: Open Source Alternative to Vercel, Netlify and Heroku.

item.title: open-webui/open-webui
item.description: User-friendly AI Interface (Supports Ollama, OpenAI API, …)

item.title: mauriceboe/TREK
item.description: A self-hosted travel/trip planner with real-time collaboration, interactive maps, PWA support, SSO, budgets, packing lists, and more.

item.title: usememos/memos
item.description: Open-source, self-hosted note-taking tool built for quick capture. Markdown-native, lightweight, and fully yours.

item.title: Lissy93/awesome-privacy
item.description: 🦄 A curated list of privacy & security-focused software and services

item.title: onyx-dot-app/onyx
item.description: Open Source AI Platform - AI Chat with advanced features that works with every LLM

item.title: n8n-io/n8n
item.description: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.

item.title: linkwarden/linkwarden
item.description: ⚡️⚡️⚡️ Self-hosted collaborative bookmark manager to collect, read, annotate, and fully preserve what matters, all in one place.

item.title: mealie-recipes/mealie
item.description: Mealie is a self hosted recipe manager and meal planner with a RestAPI backend and a reactive frontend application built in Vue for a pleasant user experience for the whole family. Easily add recipes into your database by providing the url and mealie will automatically import the relevant data or add a family recipe with the UI editor

item.title: Kareadita/Kavita
item.description: Kavita is a fast, feature rich, cross platform reading server. Built with the goal of being a full solution for all your reading needs. Setup your own server and share your reading collection with your friends and family.

item.title: janhq/jan
item.description: Jan is an open source alternative to ChatGPT that runs 100% offline on your computer.

item.title: ArchiveBox/ArchiveBox
item.description: 🗃 Open source self-hosted web archiving. Takes URLs/browser history/bookmarks/Pocket/Pinboard/etc., saves HTML, JS, PDFs, media, and more…

item.title: mikeroyal/Self-Hosting-Guide
item.description: Self-Hosting Guide. Learn all about locally hosting (on premises & private web servers) and managing software applications by yourself or your organization. Including Cloud, LLMs, WireGuard, Automation, Home Assistant, and Networking.

item.title: navidrome/navidrome
item.description: 🎧 Your Personal Streaming Service

item.title: Lissy93/dashy
item.description: 🚀 A self-hostable personal dashboard built for you. Includes status-checking, widgets, themes, icon packs, a UI editor and tons more!

item.title: rommapp/romm
item.description: A beautiful, powerful, self-hosted rom manager and player.

item.title: timothepoznanski/poznote
item.description: Poznote is a personal note-taking and documentation platform.

item.title: iib0011/omni-tools
item.description: Self-hosted collection of powerful web-based tools for everyday tasks. No ads, no tracking, just fast, accessible utilities right from your browser!

item.title: marcopiovanello/yt-dlp-web-ui
item.description: A terrible web ui and RPC server for yt-dlp. Designed to be self-hosted.

item.title: TM9657/flow-like
item.description: Flow-Like: Strongly Typed Enterprise Scale Workflows. Built for scalability, speed, seamless AI integration and rich customization.

item.title: getmaxun/maxun
item.description: 🔥 The open-source no-code platform for web scraping, crawling, search and AI data extraction • Turn websites into structured APIs in minutes 🔥

item.title: louislam/uptime-kuma
item.description: A fancy self-hosted monitoring tool

item.title: siyuan-note/siyuan
item.description: A privacy-first, self-hosted, fully open source personal knowledge management software, written in typescript and golang.

item.title: dgtlmoon/changedetection.io
item.description: Best and simplest tool for website change detection, web page monitoring, and website change alerts. Perfect for tracking content changes, price drops, restock alerts, and website defacement monitoring—all for free or enjoy our SaaS plan!

item.title: louislam/dockge
item.description: A fancy, easy-to-use and reactive self-hosted docker compose.yaml stack-oriented manager

item.title: getarcaneapp/arcane
item.description: Modern Docker Management, Designed for Everyone

item.title: go-vikunja/vikunja
item.description: The to-do app to organize your life.

item.title: ancsemi/Haven
item.description: Self-hosted private chat — No cloud, no telemetry, no Big Tech. Discord alternative that runs on your own machine.

item.title: glanceapp/glance
item.description: A self-hosted dashboard that puts all your feeds in one place

item.title: khoj-ai/khoj
item.description: Your AI second brain. Self-hostable. Get answers from the web or your docs. Build custom agents, schedule automations, do deep research. Turn any online or local LLM into your personal, autonomous AI (gpt, claude, gemini, llama, qwen, mistral). Get started - free.

item.title: wallabag/wallabag
item.description: wallabag is a self hostable application for saving web pages: Save and classify articles. Read them later. Freely.

item.title: karakeep-app/karakeep
item.description: A self-hostable bookmark-everything app (links, notes and images) with AI-based automatic tagging and full text search

item.title: CodesWhat/drydock
item.description: Open source container update monitoring — 23 registries, 20 notification triggers, audit log, OIDC auth, Prometheus metrics, and a modern dashboard.

item.title: traderepublic/Cilicon
item.description: 🛠️ Self-Hosted ephemeral macOS CI on Apple Silicon

item.title: m1k1o/neko
item.description: A self hosted virtual browser that runs in docker and uses WebRTC.

item.title: automatisch/automatisch
item.description: The open source Zapier alternative. Build workflow automation without spending time and money.

item.title: ridafkih/keeper.sh
item.description: Open-source calendar sync tool & universal calendar MCP server. Aggregate, sync and control calendars on Google, Outlook, Office 365, iCloud, CalDAV or ICS.

item.title: blinkospace/blinko
item.description: An open-source, self-hosted personal AI note tool prioritizing privacy, built using TypeScript .

item.title: solidtime-io/solidtime
item.description: Modern open-source time-tracking app

item.title: andrii-kryvoviaz/slink
item.description: Self-hosted image sharing service

item.title: kyantech/Palmr
item.description: 🌴 Palmr. is an open-source file-sharing platform focused on privacy and security. It enables users to upload, manage, and share files with features like password protection, custom links, and access control without tracking or limitations. Designed for seamless and secure sharing, Palmr. is completely free.

item.title: TwiN/gatus
item.description: Automated developer-oriented status page with alerting and incident support

item.title: awesome-foss/awesome-sysadmin
item.description: A curated list of amazingly awesome open-source sysadmin resources.

item.title: coollabsio/coolify
item.description: An open-source, self-hostable PaaS alternative to Vercel, Heroku & Netlify that lets you easily deploy static sites, databases, full-stack applications and 280+ one-click services on your own servers.

item.title: knadh/listmonk
item.description: High performance, self-hosted, newsletter and mailing list manager with a modern dashboard. Single binary app.

item.title: pawelmalak/flame
item.description: Flame is self-hosted startpage for your server. Easily manage your apps and bookmarks with built-in editors.

item.title: getlago/lago
item.description: Open Source Metering and Usage Based Billing API ⭐️ Consumption tracking, Subscription management, Pricing iterations, Payment orchestration & Revenue analytics

item.title: Sync-in/server
item.description: Sync-in server · Secure, open-source platform for file storage, sharing, collaboration, and syncing.

item.title: David-Crty/databasement
item.description: Self-hosted database backup manager with a web UI. Schedule, backup, and restore MySQL, PostgreSQL, MariaDB, MongoDB, SQLite & Redis to S3, SFTP, or local storage. SSH Tunnel support.

item.title: IceWhaleTech/CasaOS
item.description: CasaOS - A simple, easy-to-use, elegant open-source Personal Cloud system.

item.title: bulwarkmail/webmail
item.description: Webmail built for the 21st Century. A modern, self-hosted email client for Stalwart Mail Server powered by the JMAP protocol. Email, calendar, contacts and files. Fast, private, and open source.

item.title: suitenumerique/docs
item.description: A collaborative note taking, wiki and documentation platform that scales. Built with Django and React.

item.title: n8n-io/self-hosted-ai-starter-kit
item.description: The Self-hosted AI Starter Kit is an open-source template that quickly sets up a local AI environment. Curated by n8n, it provides essential tools for creating secure, self-hosted AI workflows.

item.title: getumbrel/llama-gpt
item.description: A self-hosted, offline, ChatGPT-like chatbot. Powered by Llama 2. 100% private, with no data leaving your device. New: Code Llama support!

item.title: logdyhq/logdy-core
item.description: Realtime log viewer with web UI, tail -f for logs with a web interface browser.

item.title: FoxxMD/multi-scrobbler
item.description: Scrobble plays from multiple sources to multiple clients

item.title: Freika/dawarich
item.description: Your favorite self-hostable alternative to Google Timeline (Google Location History)

item.title: Bubka/2FAuth
item.description: A Web app to manage your Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) accounts and generate their security codes

item.title: rustmailer/bichon
item.description: Bichon – A lightweight, high-performance Rust email archiver with WebUI

item.title: Sharkord/sharkord
item.description: Lightweight, self-hosted, open-source chat server with voice, video, text, and screen sharing. Built for small groups who want privacy, simplicity, and full control over their data.

item.title: Termix-SSH/Termix
item.description: Termix is a web-based server management platform with SSH terminal, tunneling, and file editing capabilities.

item.title: claabs/epicgames-freegames-node
item.description: Automatically login and find available free games the Epic Games Store. Sends you a prepopulated checkout link so you can complete the checkout after logging in. Supports multiple accounts, login sessions, and scheduled runs.

item.title: alexta69/metube
item.description: Self-hosted video downloader for YouTube and other sites (web UI for youtube-dl / yt-dlp)

item.title: givanz/Vvveb
item.description: Powerful and easy to use cms to build websites, blogs or ecommerce stores.

item.title: owlistic-notes/owlistic
item.description: 🦉 Free open-source notetaking app with real-time sync 🔄⚡️🚀

item.title: CodeWithCJ/SparkyFitness
item.description: SparkyFitness: Built for Families. Powered by AI. Track food, fitness, water, and health — together.

item.title: brufdev/many-notes
item.description: Markdown note-taking web application designed for simplicity

item.title: kittendevv/Invio
item.description: Self-hosted invoicing without the bloat.

item.title: sandstorm-io/sandstorm
item.description: Sandstorm is a self-hostable web productivity suite. It’s implemented as a security-hardened web app package manager. | Actively sponsored by our friends at TestMu AI

item.title: gabehf/Koito
item.description: Koito is a modern, themeable scrobbler that you can use with any program that scrobbles to a custom ListenBrainz URL

item.title: anderspitman/awesome-tunneling
item.description: List of ngrok, Cloudflare Tunnel, Tailscale, and ZeroTier alternatives and other tunneling software and services. Focus on self-hosting.

item.title: ironcalc/IronCalc
item.description: Main engine of the IronCalc ecosystem

item.title: Forceu/Gokapi
item.description: Lightweight selfhosted Firefox Send alternative without public upload. AWS S3 supported.

item.title: anyproto/any-sync-dockercompose
item.description: Deploy your own any-sync network with Docker Compose - self-host Anytype backend

item.title: johnwarne/upvote-rss
item.description: Generate rich RSS feeds from Reddit, Hacker News, Lemmy, Mbin, and more

item.title: suitux/Tagr
item.description: Self-hosted web app for browsing, playing, and editing music file metadata. Features a three-panel UI to navigate your library, listen to tracks, and write tag changes directly back to audio files. Built with Next.js, React, Prisma + SQLite, and node-taglib-sharp.

item.title: nbr23/youtube-dl-server
item.description: Web / REST interface for downloading youtube videos onto a server.

item.title: dittofeed/dittofeed
item.description: Open-source customer engagement. Automate transactional and marketing messages across email, SMS, mobile push, WhatsApp, Slack, and more 📨

item.title: LumePart/Explo
item.description: Spotify’s “Discover Weekly” for self-hosted music systems

item.title: Volmarg/personal-management-system
item.description: Your web application for managing personal data. personal.management.system.inbox@gmail.com

item.title: oldany/dropmind
item.description: Self-hosted capture layer to save anything from anywhere.

item.title: seanmorley15/AdventureLog
item.description: Self-hostable travel tracker and trip planner.

item.title: IliasHad/edit-mind
item.description: Local-first AI video intelligence platform. Index your video library with multi-modal analysis (YOLO, DeepFace, Whisper), search semantically via natural language, Docker-ready.

item.title: github-aws-runners/terraform-aws-github-runner
item.description: Terraform module for scalable GitHub action runners on AWS

item.title: aizhimou/pigeon-pod
item.description: Listen to YouTube & Bilibili. Anywhere.

item.title: AlexGustafsson/cupdate
item.description: A service to keep container images secure and up-to-date. Made for Kubernetes and Docker.

item.title: zen-logic/file-hunter
item.description: File Hunter — catalog, deduplicate, and consolidate your archive storage

item.title: hackthedev/dcts-shipping
item.description: A Chat Platform like Discord but self-hostable like TeamSpeak

item.title: timelinize/timelinize
item.description: Store your data from all your accounts and devices in a single cohesive timeline on your own computer

item.title: blob42/gosuki
item.description: A lightweight, open-source, privacy-first bookmark manager that unifies your bookmarks across multiple browsers, syncs them in real time (locally or P2P), requires no extensions, and stores everything locally.

item.title: neonwatty/meme-search
item.description: The open source Meme Search Engine and Finder. Free and built to self-host locally with Python, Ruby, and Docker.

item.title: mrmn2/PdfDing
item.description: Selfhosted PDF manager, viewer and editor offering a seamless user experience on multiple devices.

item.title: TheNickOfTime/handbrake-web
item.description: A self-hosted platform to use HandBrake on your headless devices via a bespoke web interface. Harness the processing power of multiple devices to work on a single queue.

item.title: MertJSX/folderhost
item.description: Your own private cloud in one executable. Share files, collaborate on code, and manage users without complex setup.

item.title: corenting/eddrit
item.description: A lightweight alternative frontend for Reddit.

item.title: SmilyOrg/photofield
item.description: A self-hosted non-invasive single-binary photo gallery with a focus on speed and simplicity.

item.title: vinceanalytics/vince
item.description: Self Hosted Alternative To Google Analytics

item.title: fossar/selfoss
item.description: multipurpose rss reader, live stream, mashup, aggregation web application

item.title: nicoan/kindly-rss-reader
item.description: RSS Aggregator optimized for e-ink devices
